title: UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES, INC. TO PRESENT AT MAY HEALTHCARE CONFERENCES
text: KING OF PRUSSIA, Pa. , April 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE: UHS) announced today that Steve Filton, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer will present at the following conferences: Tuesday, May 9, 2023, at 2:20pm (PT)/5:20pm (ET) at the Bank of America Securities 2023 Healthcare Conference in Las Vegas, Nevada Tuesday, May 16, 2023, at 9:30am (ET) at the 2023 RBC Capital Markets Global Healthcare Conference in New York, New York Live audio webcasts of the presentations will be available on the Company's website (www.uhs.com).

title: Universal Health (UHS) Q1 Earnings Beat on Higher Admissions
text: Universal Health's (UHS) Q1 results reflect strong performance in acute care and behavioral health segments. Meanwhile, the elevated expense level partially offsets the positives.

title: Universal Health Services (UHS) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Universal Health Services (UHS) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.34 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.15 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.15 per share a year ago.

title: Universal Health Services (UHS) Reports Next Week: What to Know Ahead of the Release
text: Universal Health Services (UHS) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Why Is Universal Health Realty's Dividend So High?
text: Universal Health Realty owns healthcare properties, with a great many leased to its external manager, Universal Health Services. The REIT's yield is at the high end of the stock's yield range over the past decade.

title: 4 Stocks in Focus as Hospital Industry Witnesses Improvement
text: Easing staffing challenges and technological adoption are aiding the margins of the Zacks Medical-Hospital industry players. HCA Healthcare (HCA), Universal Health (UHS), Acadia (ACHC) and Tenet Healthcare (THC) are poised to gain from improving volumes.
